mechanics.excerpt: The preponderance of trueborns in the war- rior caste is accepted as further evidence of trueborn superior- ity; the only trueborns among the civilian castes are those who wash out Of warrior training: Freeborn genes cannot be used in the breeding program unless the freeborn warrior acquires Bloodname an almost impossible feat for freeborn _ Ironically; the rare inclusion those freeborn genes prevents genetic stagnation in the warrior caste ing and willingness to accept punishment; the strength to admit mistakes and accept the consequences considered virtue in Clan society: Trial of Grlevance When dispute cannot be resolved by other means the Trial of Grievance comes into play: Among warriors _ this Trial is duel; tougnt with without equipment, the winner of which is deemed t0 be in the rght.
